title: Beta
description: Make a project verifiable on real target projects with non-mock prechecks, release coverage matrix evidence, and final beta readiness reports.
phaseTargets: exercise at least one real external or product boundary
architectureCriteria: release coverage matrix can map to product capabilities
evidence and final reports are persisted outside transient chat
repair actions can be productized instead of rerun-only
runtimeCriteria: at least one real LLM, SCM, CI/CD, or product API boundary is verified when applicable
health checks are not used as release evidence by themselves
releaseCriteria: final report contains matrix status and decision chain
missing GA evidence is explicitly listed
